messages.content: Would it be possible to build a version to help read the Book of Mormon in different languages? Iâve been trying to read the Book of Mormon in Spanish for a while now but I struggle to get past first Nephi 1â¦ I think reading a couple verses at a time with a quick comprehension quiz at the end would be such a big help and motivation and could really help lots of members, especially missionaries who are trying to understand the language better
